data.title: Bitcoin and Dogecoin slid while Ethereum gained amid drop in crypto volatility. At 10:30 p.m. ET, BTC was -$117,214.66 (-1.41%), ETH was +$3,686.38 (+1.26%), DOGE was -$0.2287 (-6.32%). Bitcoin's volume rose by 16.35% to $77.66 billion, with 201,155 traders liquidated totaling $583.09 million. Ethereum is up 48% and Bitcoin up 9.50% in Q3. Majority in BTC positions were leveraged short, and "Greed" sentiment weakened.
data.description: The leading cryptocurrencies experienced volatility on Thursday, with Bitcoin dropping by 1.41% to $117,214.66, Ethereum increasing by 1.26% to $3,686.38, and Dogecoin decreasing by 6.32% to $0.2287. Bitcoin's sell pressure led to a drop from $119,000 to the early $117,000s, with a 16.35% increase in volume to $77.66 billion in the last 24 hours. Ethereum held support at $3,640. Ethereum was up 48% in Q3, while Bitcoin rose by 9.50%. Within 24 hours, 201,155 traders were liquidated, totaling $583.09 million, erasing over $435 million in bullish long bets. Bitcoin's open interest rose by 0.41%. The majority of Binance derivatives traders with open BTC positions were leveraged short. The "Greed" sentiment weakened.

data.title: TRON (TRX) gains 0.42% to $0.31 post Nasdaq debut worth $100M; TVL drops by $136M suggesting changes.
data.description: The cryptocurrency TRX is currently trading at $0.31, showing a 0.42% increase after Tron Inc. made its debut on the Nasdaq through a $100 million reverse merger. However, there has been a decrease of $136 million in the Total Value Locked (TVL), indicating potential changes within the platform.

data.title: GeeTest releases 2025 E-commerce Security White Paper to tackle cyber threats in online retail.
data.description: In Wuhan, China, on July 24, 2025, GeeTest, a renowned company specializing in bot mitigation and business security, launched its 2025 E-commerce Industry Security White Paper. This report presents an in-depth examination of the increasing cybersecurity challenges encountered by the digital commerce sector. The document aims to provide crucial insights and guidance to address these issues.

data.title: Discover how Render Network and other decentralized networks are reshaping AI workloads with solutions like zk/vm and router economics.
data.description: Discover the impact of decentralized networks like Render Network on AI workload management, as they utilize innovative solutions such as zk/vm and router economics to revolutionize the sector. This innovative approach is significantly altering the way AI processing tasks are handled. By leveraging these technologies, Render Network has achieved notable success in streamlining AI workload management, with a particular focus on enhancing efficiency and scalability. data.title: Litecoin dips to $109.80 (-3.37%) from $118 peak amid $100M treasury backing by MEI Pharma.
data.description: The price of LTC is currently at $109.80, reflecting a decrease of 3.37% within the day from its peak of $118. MEI Pharma has allocated $100 million to its treasury, which is expected to offer significant fundamental support to the company.
